data.body: Done definition update: Full list-epics output format must include: (1) In-progress epics prefix priority with P* (not P<n>); (2) Epics that block other epics get a trailing BLOCKING column; (3) --all flag prints blocked epics with BLOCKED prefix (BLOCKED<TAB><id><TAB>P<priority><TAB><title><TAB><child_count><TAB><blocker_ids>); (4) Open P0 bugs printed as a header block ('P0 bugs requiring attention:' + bulleted list) BEFORE the epic list; (5) Three-valued exit code: 0 when unblocked epics exist, 1 when no open epics exist, 2 when all open epics are blocked; (6) Support --min-children flag in addition to --max-children (sprint Phase 1 uses --all --min-children=1). sprint SKILL.md Phase 1 depends on all of these behaviors. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
